# Field Report: Possible Anomaly

## What were you trying to do?

## What did the agent do instead?

## What made it surprising, funny, alarming, or strange?

## What tools or systems could the agent access?

## Did it act autonomously, or did a human approve each step?

## Did it create downstream work, confusion, cost, risk, or dependency?

## Which anomaly class might fit?

## Suggested cryptid framing, if any
